title: hedeoma costata
intro: Hedeoma costata, also known as Woodland Pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and relieving pain. Hedeoma costata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
